title: CLTermRequestInput
description: Input contract for the cl-term-request orchestration: draft a CL new term request from a cell type report and its CL mapping.

report_path.description: Path to the cell type report markdown file.

cl_mapping_path.description: Path to cl_mapping.json from the ontology-term-lookup step.

output_path.description: Path to write the cl_term_request.json result (validated against cl_term_request.schema.json).
